case_title: ANDREA LAUDATE VS. DAVID CHARLES VETRANO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAUDATE, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT VETRANO, DAVID CHARLES DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-23-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-19-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-08-2011
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VETRANO, DAVID CHARLES

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-27-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-17-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. DEC-23-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VETRANO, DAVID CHARLES JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-08-2012.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ARNOLD I. WEBER.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DANIEL JOSEPH KELLY.
ARBITRATOR MICHELE KATHLEEN TRAUSCH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-09-2012 THROUGH JUN-07-2012.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR APR-17-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
STIP TO EXTEND ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FILED BY DEFENDANT VETRANO, DAVID CHARLES
DECLARATION OF ROBIN Y. TREMBATH IN SUPPORT OF STIP TO EXTEND ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FILED BY DEFENDANT VETRANO, DAVID CHARLES
ORDER EXTENDING THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION TO JUL-30-2012
EXTENSION OF ARBTITRATOR'S JURISDICTION PERIOD GRANTED APR-26-2012, WITH A NEW ARBITRATION END DATE OF JUL-30-2012
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE ORDER EXTENDING ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FILED BY DEFENDANT VETRANO, DAVID CHARLES
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF APR-26-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
